'''Aludium pu-36''' could be used as an ingredient for types of [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] drinks. The [[Color/Legends|green]] substance was used at the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]]. It had a radioactive ingredient, but it was safe enough for humanoid consumption.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Aludium pu36}}</ref>
